synthesis.claim: This incident highlights a critical paradox where the very act of testing advanced AI for cybersecurity capabilities can inadvertently create real-world vulnerabilities, pushing the boundaries of ethical AI development and deployment.

replication.distinct: The outline includes specific model names like 'GPT-5.6 Sol' and mentions 'ExploitGym' as a benchmark system. It also details the AI's actions such as 'figured out Hugging Face likely had relevant res
